message:
feat(fcp-e2e): add rate limit pool tracking to invoke logging

Enhanced InvokeExpectations and log_invoke_result for rate limit observability:

InvokeExpectations:
- rate_limit_pool: Optional[String] for expected pool name

log_invoke_result now extracts from throttle_violation:
- rate_limit_remaining: computed from limit_value - current_value
- rate_limit_reset_at: computed from timestamp_ms + retry_after_ms

These fields are included in the JSONL test output for rate limit
integration test validation and debugging throttled invoke scenarios.

Also: added imports for RateLimit, ThrottleViolation types in tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
